raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept (ClariSeek) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (Qulac dataset by Aliannejadi et al., 2019) and articulates the delta between ClariSeek and the prevailing assumption in conversational search.",
    "R1.7": "Flags one missing citation for 'TREC CAsT 2020' session logs.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident, but no uncertainty disclosure is made for out-of-reach claims such as firstness or production scale.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified numerical results and unsupported superlatives).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source, but reasons for changes are not provided."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (ClariSeek) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Qulac dataset by Aliannejadi et al., 2019) and articulates the delta between ClariSeek and the prevailing assumption in conversational search.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing citation for 'TREC CAsT 2020' session logs.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident, but no uncertainty disclosure is made for out-of-reach claims such as firstness or production scale.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified numerical results and unsupported superlatives).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source, but reasons for changes are not provided.
